text: Who was that
Yes sir 🫡
A random auto guy
Itss okkay..I understand.. you should be careful.. especially at night .Better to be safe
Try to avoid these autos at night ma'am. Better to use autos from uber or ola at night and share the location with someone..they got that feature..so someone can always see where you are
And always keep talking to someone..you can talk to me or anyone
Will do that sir
Yess and I might sound that I am exaggerating the things .but keep something for your safety..pepper spray for instance.. especially at nights
I have ordered
Nope I know it’s for my good
I don't want to make you scared ma'am..but I want to be careful always
*you to be
I know I am taking a risk and will have consequences
Will try my best for doing as much as I can
Don't say this.. Everything will be good.
Insha allah
Insha Allah
It takes 8 mins for you to reach?
Yep
Okk
I have got off the rickshaw
And am walking to my home
Okayy .cool
How many mins it take
Mins
Okkay
Have reached
Cool
I will have dinner ..and then I will be back
Yeppp
Cat is waiting for the driver 😅
I am putting a face mask
Will come in 5 mins
Coming for the cat?
I am back
Yes
To ride to utopia
Yess
One of the reasons I like to go for walks at night are the cats
I find so many of them
Gthat must feel so good
They are therapeutic
I yess..mostly I find them at the same spot .I scratch their heads and they don't even run away now 😅
We can go together as well sometime
I would love that sir
Do u know spf sir ?
Is that for sunsceen
Yeass
Good
My sister got one with some number and spf written on ut
Why is that
I thought u knew what it is
It’s essential to use sir
Before stepping out
I thought it's all gimmicky
It’s too protect skin from sunlight
Okkay 🤧
Do u apply anything in ur face sir?
Yes ma'am I do
Water
Like for real..but I use facewash sometimes
Will fix that
For u sir
Okkay
I thought it's all advertisement and  making us use their products 🥲
Well we don’t nevessarily have to buy expensive ones
But they are well needed
Alright....so, you do have skin care routine
I worked in skin care clinic for almost a year
So yes sir I do
Yes, right you did told
I shall wait
They have started the bombing again
I am so drained and cannot imagine the future
Yess, there was a temporary truce.. murders are back murdering innocents 😢
At this rate i thinkjj in no bombing all Jews will nut be so bad
A permanent stop to this

Yeahh...but we should keep talking about that...all this is happening because of shameless countries like US, UK, European countries and the most shameless of all Arab countries..UAE is hosting climate summit today with leaders all over the world shamelessly and they don't have guts to utter a single word on the atrocities carried out by these murderers
It’s stupidly nonsensical
Exactly
They want people to force into the Sinai desert which is in Egypt and occupy whatever is left
I actually felt weirdly normal these days
And did not realise until I saw the videos again
It was somewhat peaceful for a week due to this truce deal
Not much was happening other than exchange of hostages
Right
Did you have milk after coming home?
Yes I did
I almost forgot to ask sir
I thought so
What ma'am
What so late with the dinner sir
I was going to have ...but u were not getting a rickshaw..so I thought I should keep talking
Will try to have early ma'am :)
Hmm
You returned your assets to the previous company today?
Yes I did
Went in the morning
Alright..so no more visits to them now
Yeppp
But I forgot to bring my tasbih and praying mat from there
So once as I find time I will go to take it
You sent an attachment.
Okkay, right
My typing is like this na ?
Nope, I can figure out what you are saying
You can be honest
It’s not like I can do anything through the screen
I am for real...just like sometime I have to read a few times to get what u mean..but most of the time I can figure it out..I am good at this
I am glad honestly for your smartness
Or else learning how to type was not in my to do

You have come a long way .I remember when we talked on bumble..I asked if you have insta or something so that we can talk somewhere else..then you were like I don't like to  use these apps..you can WhatsApp me if you want
Yes’s I have never spoken to someone out of my comfort zone
My mind makes it so hard that I always gave up
But it’s easier and effortless here
Well I am glad
Why did you make Insta account out of the blue tho
I got my own phone and had taken pics that I could post
And I realised giving out my numbers was the biggest mistake I could do
Yess, I was kinda shocked for some time .when you gave the number
Cool
I was like what could go wrong ,🥲
Did anyone trouble you ma'am?
The same stalker I talked
His mother called last week
Whattt
And people said it’s my fault that he got my number
So I learned my lesson
You met him in bumble as well?
Nooooooo
How did he got your number
From bumble I did not have such situations thankfully
He dropped me off for gpay he got the no and
What the actual fuck...how can be people so creep
How it's your fault then ..I don't get it..
They said you should be careful and connected that I am careless and gives out number to anybody
People who do victim blaming are the worst
Like seriously almost everyone uses gpay..how can it be someones fault that you paid them money and they turn out to be such low life scum and start harassing someone
I was scared and even tried talking to him as if to avoid angering him (stupid I know ) but right after it clicked to me
Then I told everyone and they handled it
Never ever tolerate something like that no matter who that is..you gotta show them their place
I learned it the hard way
But it was better as it prevented the upcoming
Yess
Yepp
What else was wired about me sir?
I said shocking ma'am
Just want to say, if you ever find yourself in difficult situations please tell me
I tell you everything that I am anxious it burdens you
Like you don’t tell me anything 🙁
I can handle it..I am used to things.
But u don’t need to handle, it’s not your reaponsibilty In a way
Really .I thought I do
Did not meant to offend
I meant I will be fine ma'am. You don't have to worry
You can tell me if you feel like it obviously
Yes sir 🫡
When will go to dentist tomorrow?
They were like I can come anytime
That’s nice 🥸
Did it ever cross your mind that u will find me here 😂
Neverrrrr
Okkayy
I regretted bumble too much
And felt nothing good ever could come out of it
Right...the app is such you can't expect it to be good
And I honestly could not remember about our conversation as well
Like it was vague to me
I remember it cause you were the last person I talked to as well and then I deleted the app
Because you gave your number and I thought we can talk on WhatsApp now maybe
You feeling sleepy now
Same
Nope
Yes.u told
Surprisingly I am not sleepy yet
Are u sir ?
Nope
When u will be waking up tomorrow
Whenever ig
Right.. holiday
Yepp
But you do have to go sir
So we shall sleep
I will go in the afternoon mostly
Okkay ma'am
Allah hafiz
Allah hafiz Mr Aamir
Take care Bushra :)
Hello Hana
Did you wake up?
Instagram user sent an attachment.
Yes
had to go out to bring some veggies
Did you have breakfast ma'am
Yep
Sabudana ka khichdi
Do you like it
I said I won’t eat first
Then it looked good
Okkay...I never had that
Today I woke up Lil late..came back from gym now and having breakfast
You have not had it ever?
I had sabudana Vada..the fried one
Yeppp
My mum makes it in Ramadan
It does taste good
It has lot of oil tho
Ramadan and oil are inseparable
Is it oats 🫣
True
Yess 😶
With ?
Oats + Muesli + milk + banana, apple, strawberry + dates + peanut butter 😂
Are you messing with me sir
Nope..like for real
I can't have oats on its own
The combination
😁is good
Can you eat this much tho 😅
I doubt
Then I won’t eat for the rest of the day
As I will keep thinking it was too much
Got me laughing
I mean smaller portion of all those things..like 30gm of oats and 30 GM muesli and one banana half apple 1 or 2 strawberry..2 dates and one spoon of peanut butter...I guess you can have this much
I keep seeing it as a big bowl
I am thinking of blending it all together now and have it as a smoothie
I can drink more than I can eat
This could be an good way
If it turns out good, I will send it to you
I have lasssiiii☺️
You like lassi
Yesss
What beverage did you like sir ?
I do too...I like the one you get in glass more than the packaged one.. especially the lassi you get in north side
They have this malai on top
I like coffee 💀I used to drink too much soft drinks like thumbs up, coke, sprite..but I don't now.
Yuppp..you know
You sound like a sophisticated adult sir
Well I stopped drinking soft drinks because of this war going on
I mean most of them are Israeli products
You don't like coffee?
I drink it but cannot have it taste bad
Like black coffee or bitter is not me
I mean black one isn't for everyone tbh
I like everything that has to do with coffee..like coffee cakes, cookies
They are good
I like them
My sister in morning was putting these cringey songs
I was flipping annoyed
Then we fought and she stopped
What kind of songs 😅
Salman khan’s
Is she Salman Khan fan
Nahh
Like to annoy
Okk..pure sibling energy
Are u the scary sibling sir ?
I was once..not now 😂
Tell me about it
I mean I used to make them do things for me like writing assignments and all the small stuff
Now they don't..now they start telling my mom😂
Evolution
Once I was angry with my brother and I hit him and he started crying..you know how they act exaggerating everything. My parents came home at the same time..I had to bribe him to keep his mouth shut 😂
I am laughing here and mum is asking to show what is the video about
I was never bribed tho my parents could never believe I was the one hit
And my sis always cried in between us
Emotional blackmail
It was so fustrating that she ends crying first
Okk..so u had a different reputation...were you the stronger one 😅
It's frustrating..once when I hit my brother and he started crying..then i started crying as well..then he looked at me like what are you even doing and he stopped 😂
Actually it’s pretty dark
Like she had diabetes and was weaker but had the worst mouth I swear
She would the provoke the hell outta me and expect me to sit and not do anything
This was epic
Well I can understand..but again typical sibling behaviour and later you act like nothing happened
Yepp
And now it’s like we were never like this
We grew up ig
Yess, we do..it becomes less and less..which is good but sad sometimes
When will go to the dentist sir ?
Will be leaving now ma'am
Need to go to Khar
Oh it’s far
After Bandra..
Yep I have been Santacruz
Cool
It's a station after Santacruz
Will go by train sir ?
I don't feel like taking train..will go by rickshaw
Richie rich
I am lazy when it comes to public transport
